creator: msnkipa@mail.ru
text:
I have some problems with installation of beta1.5 and beta1. That problems are:

1) I try to install system via "passive ftp". So, when I use DHCP nrtwork configuration anything works fine, but when I try to specify network configuration by hands (without using of DHCP) my system cant find any ftp mirror.

2) When you restart installation program, hav been formatted disks, and has began to copy "... base into /..." disk write error occur: " can`t write to diks... if full"

3) After all ports has been coppied, screen with message "LOCADET INDEX...." appear. After few minutes of this screen appear screen with information about that " SIG -10 has been caught..." and all installation fail!

So I can`t install it :(
